Information
527 FEED_TUBE_DSCHRG_CD FEED_TUBE_DSCHRG_CD Nutritional Approaches (Discharge): Feeding Tube CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was on a feeding tube as their nutritional approach at the time of discharge. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
528 ALTRD_DIET_ADMSN_CD ALTRD_DIET_ADMSN_CD Nutritional Approaches (Admission) : Mech Alt Diet CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient needed a mechanically altered diet as their nutritional approach at the
